Class DoublyLinkedSongNode

java.lang.Object
DoublyLinkedSongNode
public class DoublyLinkedSongNode extends Object
Represents a single node in the SongLinkedList. Each node stores a Song and a reference to the next node.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DoublyLinkedSongNode(Song song)
    Constructor: creates a node with a song and no next link.
